title: Prescott BeatMob 🪩
description:
Join us at Northern Arizona’s friendliest dance social 😃! Come learn something new or challenge your skills to a mix of mostly West Coast Swing, with plenty of Country Swing tracks & a little bit of Night Club-2-Step, AZ-2-Step, & even East Coast Swing thrown in🎶💃🏻 No experience necessary! 

Lesson | 6pm | $5
Social | 7pm | $5
address: The Hazeltine Theater, Restaurants near, 208 N Marina St, Prescott, AZ 86301, USA

title: White Rabbit: Unplugged
description:
Follow the white rabbit.

Nivens is extra excited this month! Not only does Unplugged fall directly upon the equinox (making it perfect to celebrate the start of Spring! Nivens' favorite time of year, of course), but we get to host one of AZ's most promising and magnetic young stars on the circuit: WSDC All-Star Justin Kereszturi!

Justin is incredibly talented, and his meteoric rise to All-Star level is testament to his dedication and commitment to the craft of West Coast Swing.

8pm: "Linear Vs Rotational" w/Justin Kereszturi (All levels)
Explore the difference between linear and rotational movement within west coast swing. Learn how to manipulate your frame to control the type of connection and clearly communicate with your partner.

9pm: Party

Remember:
- If it glows it won't say "no"
- White Rabbit is a safe space for all
- No unsolicited feedback on the social floor

All are welcome! See you there!
venue: Imperial Ballroom Dance Company, 15475 N Greenway Hayden Loop Suite 17 B, Scottsdale, AZ 85260, USA
